---
title: 'Supreme Confusion'
date: '2015-06-29T02:27:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2765148150600481501'
blogger_filename: '/2015/06/supreme-confusion.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Deleted. I love gay people. I hate gay activists?<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
